About the Studio

Where surrealism meets precision craft

Nomad Studio is a premium CGI and AI visual production house based in Cairo, built for brands that refuse to be ordinary. We operate at the intersection of 3D artistry, motion design, and AI-generated imagery — producing work that commands attention.

Founded by a visual director with 8 years of experience working across fashion, luxury, and technology brands, the studio channels a distinctly surrealist visual language over minimal structural restraint.

  • 3D generalist work across Blender — modelling, shading, rendering
  • AI visual direction with MidJourney, Kling, and proprietary pipelines
  • Motion graphics and cinematic brand storytelling
  • Monthly retainer model — your studio, always on
Work With Us

What We Create

Studio services

01

CGI & 3D Production

Photorealistic product visualizations, architectural renders, and conceptual 3D worlds built in Blender. From still frames to full animations — every detail considered.

Blender Product Viz Animation Rendering
02

AI Visual Direction

Cinematic AI-generated campaigns directed with precision. We don't prompt and pray — we art-direct AI like a film set. Consistent characters, brand-true aesthetics, campaign-ready output.

MidJourney Kling Campaigns Video
03

Motion Design

Brand motion — from logo animations and UI motion to full commercial spots. Kinetic typography, motion graphics, and visual storytelling at the level of a boutique production house.

After Effects Resolve Brand Motion
04

Brand Visual Systems

A complete visual identity beyond the logo — the CGI language of your brand. What does your brand look like in 3D space? We answer that question and systematize it.

Identity Style Guides Art Direction
05

Social & Campaign Content

High-volume CGI and AI content built for modern social — reels, statics, carousels. Retainer clients get a steady pipeline of on-brand, thumb-stopping visuals every month.

Reels Statics Campaigns
06

Custom AI Pipelines

For brands that need AI visual production at scale — we build and run the pipeline. Trained on your brand DNA, producing on-brand AI output that actually looks like you.

LoRA Brand Training Automation

How We Work

The studio process

Nomad Studio runs like a boutique production house — tight, focused, and obsessively quality-driven. No junior handoffs, no bloated agency overhead. You work directly with the creative director.

01

Discovery

Brand deep-dive. We learn your visual DNA, your market positioning, and what "premium" means specifically to your audience.

02

Direction

Moodboards, style references, and creative brief. You approve the visual language before a single render is started.

03

Production

CGI, AI, motion — executed at studio standard. Two rounds of revision built in. Delivery in production-ready formats.

04

Delivery

Organized asset handoff, usage guide, and ongoing retainer support. Your visual library grows month after month.
